competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
# GitHub Copilot: Main Features & Pricing

## Core Features

**AI Code Acceleration**: GitHub Copilot provides contextualized assistance throughout development, from inline suggestions and chat assistance in IDEs to code explanations on GitHub. Developers using it report "up to 75% higher satisfaction with their jobs" and are "up to 55% more productive."

**Multi-Platform Support**: Available in VS Code, Visual Studio, JetBrains IDEs, Neovim, Xcode, Eclipse, and terminal environments through GitHub CLI.

**Flexible LLM Access**: Users can choose from leading language models optimized for speed, accuracy, or cost—including options from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google.

## Pricing Tiers

**Free**: $0/month
- 50 agent mode or chat requests monthly
- 2,000 completions monthly
- Access to Haiku 4.5, GPT-5 mini, and more

**Pro**: $10/month per user
- Unlimited inline suggestions
- 300 premium requests monthly
- Unlimited agent mode with GPT-5 mini

**Pro+**: $39/month per user
- Access to Claude Opus 4.7 and all models
- 5x premium requests of Pro tier
- GitHub Spark access

## Enterprise Solutions

GitHub Copilot Business and Enterprise plans offer organizational license management, policy controls, and IP indemnification for enterprise-scale deployment with customization capabilities.
competitors.content_hash:
# GitHub Copilot: Main Features & Pricing

## Core Features

**AI Code Acceleration**: GitHub Copilot provides contextualized assistance throughout development

changes.description: 全新三档定价体系：Free（$0，50次/月 agent mode）、Pro（$10，无限 GPT-5 mini agent mode）、Pro+（$39，Claude Opus 4.7 + GitHub Spark）
changes.evidence: 「Free: $0/month - 50 agent mode or chat requests monthly; Pro: $10/month per user - Unlimited agent mode with GPT-5 mini; Pro+: $39/month per user - Access to Claude Opus 4.7 and all models - GitHub Spark access」
changes.meee2_relevance: agent mode 已成为主流定价维度（免费层也有 50 次/月），强化 AI session 作为可量化工作单元的认知；与 meee2 锚点 #1 竞争用户对 AI 工作单元的心智模型

changes.description: GitHub Spark 出现在 Pro+ 套餐中，疑为新产品；结合 Claude Opus 4.7 专属访问，Pro+ 定位为高端 AI 工作流层
changes.evidence: 「Pro+: $39/month per user - Access to Claude Opus 4.7 and all models - GitHub Spark access」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：GitHub Spark 若为 AI-native workspace 产品，将与 meee2 在高端 AI 工作流层直接竞争（锚点 #1、#2）；需持续跟踪

changes.description: 转向量化生产力指标（75% 满意度提升、55% 效率提升），并强调跨 IDE/终端的多平台覆盖
changes.evidence: 「Developers using it report 'up to 75% higher satisfaction with their jobs' and are 'up to 55% more productive'」

key_findings: Agent mode 已进入免费层（50次/月），Pro 层提供无限次 GPT-5 mini agent mode，AI session 量化工作单元思路主流化
GitHub Spark 作为新产品捆绑在 Pro+ 层（$39/月），性质不明，若为 AI workspace 则直接竞争 meee2

alerts.headline: Agent mode 进入免费层 + GitHub Spark 新产品捆绑 Pro+，AI session 工作单元认知主流化加速
alerts.evidence: 「Free: $0/month - 50 agent mode or chat requests monthly; Pro+: $39/month per user - Access to Claude Opus 4.7 and all models - GitHub Spark access」
alerts.action_suggestion: （1）立即调查 GitHub Spark 产品性质——若为 AI workspace 或 no-code AI 应用构建器，威胁等级应升至 crit；（2）关注 agent mode 被量化为消耗品（requests/month）这一认知框架是否被用户接受，这将压缩 meee2 对 session 语义的差异化空间；（3）Pro+ 层（$39/月）捆绑最强模型 + 新产品，可观察其是否向 meee2 的 human-AI 协作协议方向演化
